title: Dianthus oxylepis

intro: Dianthus oxylepis, also known as the fragrant pink or pink fragrant pink, is a perennial plant species in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in wound healing and the treatment of respiratory issues.
